How to generate Gerber files from CircuitMaker 2.2.1.6? by: Mia Jun 27,2024 7577 Views 0 Comments Posted in PCB Design Tutorial CircuitMaker Gerber PCB This guide is about how to export Gerber file from CircuitMaker 2.2.1.6. Step 1 : Open the PCB design file first, and then open the "Project" menu and click "Generate outputs", as shown below. Step 2 : After clicking, the dialog box shown below will appear. Check the boxes next to Gerber Files and NC Drill Files. Step 3 : Click the "Configure" link next to "Gerber Files". In the dialog that opens, configure the following options in the "General" tab: Use the 2:3 format, as the mi...
